S.FORM: cinnami maniq sami krryax cinnami myan sraral nanak, yan nqu tmmyan qulih, tmmyan para. misuw qaniy aki sami smoya maniq cikah maki ngasal ga, kyalun sami llaqi mha, " aki, sknux balay qasa, iyat qaniq sqaniy." cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ¶~ ®innami maniq s~…ïami krrjax ¶~ ®innami mjan s~…ïraral nanak, jan nqu tmmjan quliƒß, tmmjan para. mis~…ïuw qanij aki s~…ïami s~…ïmoja maniq ¶~ ®ikaƒß maki ≈ãas~…ïal …£a, kjalun s~…ïami llaqi mƒßa, " aki, s~…ïknux Œ≤alaj qas~…ïa, ijat qaniq s~…ïqanij." ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î
